completed_slice: Added and tested a secret-free environment setup-plan builder that converts deployment readiness into exact operator actions while preserving the distinction between configuration and deployment proof.
verification: 4 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files.
required_external_action: Configure CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN in the cloudflare-research GitHub Environment, then dispatch .github/workflows/cloudflare-pages-research.yml.
next_action: Wire the setup-plan builder into the deployment workflow artifact set, then dispatch after the environment secrets are configured and verify the returned Cloudflare deployment identity.
